scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js
scripts.lint: npm run lint:ts && npm run lint:css
scripts.build:css: sass src/scss/list.scss static/list.min.css --style=compressed --no-source-map && sass src/scss/admin.scss static/admin.min.css --style=compressed --no-source-map && sass src/scss/detail.scss static/detail.min.css --style=compressed --no-source-map && sass src/scss/edit.scss static/edit.min.css --style=compressed --no-source-map && sass src/scss/home.scss static/home.min.css --style=compressed --no-source-map
scripts.watch:css: concurrently "sass src/scss/list.scss static/list.min.css --style=compressed --no-source-map --watch" "sass src/scss/admin.scss static/admin.min.css --style=compressed --no-source-map --watch" "sass src/scss/detail.scss static/detail.min.css --style=compressed --no-source-map --watch" "sass src/scss/edit.scss static/edit.min.css --style=compressed --no-source-map --watch" "sass src/scss/home.scss static/home.min.css --style=compressed --no-source-map --watch"
